user_request_mode: per-case explicit request string from manifests/cmu_manifest.csv
notes: This transport variant preserves the benchmark target model while routing requests through AIHubMix's OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
The original frozen_config.json remains the direct-Google reference config; this file exists because direct Google quota was unavailable at execution time.
The benchmark target model remains gemini-3.1-pro-preview.
The MACE configuration remains locked to the least-pressure macOS setting: cpu + small + float32 + no dispersion.
